name: walletguard-pro
description: Independent security layer for Web3 wallets. Intercepts transactions, decodes calldata, scans ERC-20/NFT approvals across 9 chains, detects phishing and typosquatted domains. Zero API keys required.

scripts.test: node test-typosquat.js && node test-integration.js && node test-multichain.js && node test-nft.js && node test-revoke.js && node test-build.js && node test-i18n.js && node test-onboarding.js
